name: 3 Things

ios.note: Very new app (Jul 2025). No reviews yet on iOS.

description: Minimalist daily focus app inspired by the Ivy Lee Method. Pick 3 tasks, focus on them until done. No account required. Local-first. Includes mood tracking, mind dump, motivation boosts.

pricing.free: Full app — no paid tier announced

web.headline: 3 Things — Focus on what matters
web.subheadline: Ivy Lee Method: identify your 3 most important daily tasks and complete them

top_praise: Radical simplicity — just 3 tasks per day reduces overwhelm
Mind dump feature for brain clearing
top_complaints: Very limited feature set — no recurring tasks, reminders, or sync
No backup/cloud sync means data loss risk on device change
sentiment.positioning: Ultra-minimalist anti-productivity-app. Niche appeal. Growing audience fatigued by feature-bloated alternatives.
